Speakers.Speaker: Tending to the Vegetable Garden with Friends

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}While you can garden alone, raising vegetables with the help of your friends {f 0 1 2}will result in a more plentiful harvest{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Veggies raised with help from others will take on different effects {f 0 1 2}depending on who you were gardening with{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
